shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && echo '--- src ---' && find src -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort && echo '--- dst ---' && find dst -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort && echo '--- README ---' && sed -n '1,240p' README.md

set -e
cd dst
mvn clean package -DskipTests

set -e
cd dst
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar

set -e
sleep 3
curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/' && echo
curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20Alice%20%20' && echo
